content.text:
<user_query>
Explore /Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing and find:

1. Read components/invoice-form.tsx in full
2. Read middleware.ts in full
3. Check if there are any loading.tsx files under app/dashboard/ — list them
4. Check .env.local for any OPENAI_API_KEY or AI-related env vars (just the key names, not values)
5. Read app/dashboard/page.tsx — specifically the error message that mentions Neon
6. Check if invoice_line_items table exists anywhere — search schema.sql for "line_items"
7. Read app/dashboard/invoices/[id]/pdf/page.tsx to see how line items are queried

Return full contents of invoice-form.tsx and middleware.ts.
</user_query>

Searching the codebase for the requested files and patterns.

[REDACTED]

Searching for schema files and `invoice_line_items` references across the repo.

[REDACTED]

input.final_summary: Explored invoice form, middleware, dashboard, env vars, and line-items usage. No `loading.tsx` under `app/dashboard/`, no AI env vars in `.env.local`, and `invoice_line_items` is queried in the PDF page but not defined in `supabase/schema.sql`.
